instruments.name: Music Basics
instruments.description: A pre-instrumental programme introducing children to music fundamentals through singing, movement, rhythm games, percussion & ukulele. A fun and engaging first step into the world of music.

instruments.name: Violin
instruments.description: Learn violin in a supportive group setting. Students develop good bowing technique, posture, and music reading skills while playing together with their peers. Violins are available for hire ($80 per year).

instruments.name: Cello
instruments.description: Explore the rich, warm tones of the cello in fun small group lessons (maximum 4 per class). Cellos are available for hire ($100/year).

instruments.name: Keyboard
instruments.description: Build keyboard skills including reading music, playing tunes, and developing finger coordination. A popular class — waitlists may apply.

instruments.name: Guitar
instruments.description: Learn classical guitar technique: plucking, strumming, reading music and learning beautiful tunes.

instruments.name: Flute
instruments.description: A beautiful, sweet sounding, silver wind instrument. Enjoy developing tone, breathing and fingering skills in fun group lessons. Age 9+ (tall enough to hold the instrument).

instruments.name: Recorder
instruments.description: A wonderful first instrument. Students learn music reading, develop finger coordination, and enjoy ensemble playing with others. Only c.$40 for book and instrument!

instruments.name: Trumpet
instruments.description: A bold, dramatic instrument that is exciting to play! Students learn together in an encouraging group environment. Small class (max 4 students). Must have learnt another instrument for 1 year or more.

instruments.name: Drums
instruments.description: Develop rhythm, coordination, and percussion skills. Learn to read rhythmic notation and play a variety of styles and patterns. Very popular - waitlists may apply.

instruments.name: Choir
instruments.description: Singing is good for the brain, lungs and heart!  Singing together in a fun, supportive group will develop musicality and ensemble skills. Open to all children, whether learning an instrument at Gallery or not.

instruments.name: Ensemble
instruments.description: Enjoy playing beautiful music with others! The Pat Sviatko Ensemble welcomes players who have learnt an orchestral instrument (wind, strings or brass) for 1 year or more: cello, violin, trumpet, flute, viola, percussion, recorder, double bass, oboe, clarinet, trombone, french horn... Develop valuable skills in ensemble playing, orchestral music reading, and performance.

instruments.name: Orchestra
instruments.description: The Gallery Community Orchestra is open to all ages, and it's free. For ages 7 - 99! Gallery Orchestra is for players with approximately 3 years of prior tuition. See our Orchestra page for more details.

instruments.name: Ukulele
instruments.description: An fun, gentle class that gives little ones an easy introduction to strumming and playing simple songs together.
